items.title: Crypto exchange Kraken is trying to become a bank in Europe
items.description: Kraken's focus is on Lithuania as the jurisdiction to secure the license, according to a person familiar with the plans.

items.title: SpaceX IPO powers record $3.86 billion in tokenized equities trading in June
items.description: SpaceX tokens captured $1.19 billion, or 31% of total monthly volume, with Backpack’s SPCX leading trading at $1.08 billion.

items.title: U.S. SEC to propose crypto rule as soon as this month to ease startups, fundraising
items.description: A newly updated agenda from the securities regulator shows so-called Reg Crypto high on its near-term list.

items.title: Analysts see more upside for SpaceX as post-IPO research begins
items.description: Major brokerages initiated coverage on Tuesday with mostly buy ratings following the company's $75 billion June IPO.

items.title: Vanguard opens search for digital assets leader in sign of evolving crypto strategy
items.description: The new role would oversee tokenization, stablecoins and blockchain initiatives as Vanguard reassesses digital assets.

items.title: AI trade loses steam as infrastructure boom faces reality check
items.description: Record earnings, rising competition and concerns over slowing AI spending are forcing investors to reassess one of the market's biggest trades.

items.title: EDX Markets raises $76 million in funding round led by SBI Holdings
items.description: EDX’s model targets institutional clients by separating trading from custody through a central clearinghouse to minimize counterparty risk.

items.title: Former Tether investment chief is looking to sell part of his stake in the stablecoin giant: Bloomberg
items.description: Richard Heathcote is reportedly working with PJT Partners to find a buyer for a small part of his 1.26% holding in the issuer of USDT following his transition to an advisory role.

items.title: USDT wins payments, USDC wins DeFi as stablecoins diverge: Dune
items.description: Dune data shows Tether's USDT has become crypto’s dominant payments stablecoin while Circle's USDC powers DeFi, highlighting how blockchain choice shapes stablecoin use.

items.title: Tether invests in Mercado Bitcoin as blockchain finance expands in Latin America
items.description: Mercado Bitcoin will use the funding to expand tokenized finance across Latin America, adding to Tether's growing portfolio of infrastructure investments.

items.title: Nigel Farage to resign from UK Parliament amid crypto “gift” scandal, will stand in by-election
items.description: The Reform party leader and Brexit champion confirmed that he was the subject of probes by UK authorities following reports of what he called “gifts” from figures tied to cry pto ventures.

items.title: Institutional crypto exchange EDX lands $76M from SBI Holdings
items.description: The funding round comes as institutional investors continue backing crypto market infrastructure despite slower venture investment across the digital asset sector.

items.title: Bitcoin bulls battle for $63K as Micron stock eyes 10% drop in US chip sell-off
items.description: Bitcoin came off two-week highs while US stocks dipped and John Bollinger described BTC price action as "at a critical point."

items.title: Bitcoin Covenants part 3: SIGHASH_ANYPREVOUT
items.description: APO lets a Bitcoin signature authorize any compatible UTXO rather than one fixed outpoint. It allows for rebindable pre-signed transactions for Lightning, vaults, and layer-2 protocols without new key management overhead.

items.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
items.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

items.title: Has Bitcoin bottomed for this cycle? Analysts say 'not yet'
items.description: Some Bitcoin analysts point to a deeper downside risk, while others believes they can see the early signs of a recovery.

items.title: Trump renews Greenland threats at NATO summit, says U.S. could remove troops from Europe
items.description: NATO fell into a crisis earlier this year as Trump demanded that the U.S. must take control of Greenland on national security grounds.

items.title: Pressure builds on Platner to drop out of Maine Senate race after sexual assault allegations
items.description: Platner has denied allegations of sexual assault leveled by Maine resident Jenny Racicot as calls for him to exit the pivotal race mount.

items.title: Meta enters AI image model race in bid to court advertisers and subscribers
items.description: Meta has announced Muse Image, its first AI model for image creation, as it seeks to attract creators and advertisers to its offerings.

items.title: Mitch McConnell's health concerns grow amid 4th week in hospital with few details from aides
items.description: McConnell, the former longtime Senate leader who declined to seek an eighth term following a series of health scares, was admitted to the hospital on June 14.

items.title: Strait of Hormuz threat level raised to 'severe' after Iran attacks tankers using U.S. Navy route
items.description: Iran's military has warned it will target ships that do not use a northern route approved by Tehran.

items.title: Supreme Court's Kagan, Barrett to testify to House for budget request, a first since 2019
items.description: Supreme Court justices last testified to Congress was 2019, when Elena Kagan and Samuel Alito discussed a budget request with a House subcommittee.

items.title: Chinese lidar maker with Nvidia ties accused of being cyber risk for U.S.
items.description: Hesai Technology was blacklisted as a national security threat in 2024 by the U.S. Department of Defense, which designated Hesai as a Chinese military entity.

items.title: Stellantis to sell small Fiat Topolino EV for $13,995 in U.S.
items.description: While the Topolino resembles a small car such as the Fiat 500, the EV is actually a quadricycle that functions more like a golf cart.

Could not retrieve a transcript for the video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=62e69Bz7-ww! This is most likely caused by:

YouTube is blocking requests from your IP. This usually is due to one of the following reasons:
- You have done too many requests and your IP has been blocked by YouTube
- You are doing requests from an IP belonging to a cloud provider (like AWS, Google Cloud Platform, Azure, etc.). Unfortunately, most IPs from cloud providers are blocked by YouTube.

There are two things you can do to work around this:
1. Use proxies to hide your IP address, as explained in the "Working around IP bans" section of the README (https://github.com/jdepoix/youtube-transcript-api?tab=readme-ov-file#working-around-ip-bans-requestblocked-or-ipblocked-exception).
2. (NOT RECOMMENDED) If you authenticate your requests using cookies, you will be able to continue doing requests for a while. However, YouTube will eventually permanently ban the account that you have used to authenticate with! So only do this if you don't mind your account being banned!

If you are sure that the described cause is not responsible for this error and that a transcript should be retrievable, please create an issue at https://github.com/jdepoix/youtube-transcript-api/issues. Please add which version of youtube_transcript_api you are using and provide the information needed to replicate the error. Also make sure that there are no open issues which already describe your problem!

Could not retrieve a transcript for the video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ds1K-lN_U0g! This is most likely caused by:

YouTube is blocking requests from your IP. This usually is due to one of the following reasons:
- You have done too many requests and your IP has been blocked by YouTube
- You are doing requests from an IP belonging to a cloud provider (like AWS, Google Cloud Platform, Azure, etc.). Unfortunately, most IPs from cloud providers are blocked by YouTube.

There are two things you can do to work around this:
1. Use proxies to hide your IP address, as explained in the "Working around IP bans" section of the README (https://github.com/jdepoix/youtube-transcript-api?tab=readme-ov-file#working-around-ip-bans-requestblocked-or-ipblocked-exception).
2. (NOT RECOMMENDED) If you authenticate your requests using cookies, you will be able to continue doing requests for a while. However, YouTube will eventually permanently ban the account that you have used to authenticate with! So only do this if you don't mind your account being banned!

If you are sure that the described cause is not responsible for this error and that a transcript should be retrievable, please create an issue at https://github.com/jdepoix/youtube-transcript-api/issues. Please add which version of youtube_transcript_api you are using and provide the information needed to replicate the error. Also make sure that there are no open issues which already describe your problem!

items.title: How far can a ‘Messi strategy’ get Argentina?
items.description: A team shaped around the 39-year-old relies on controlled possession

items.title: Rachel Reeves calls for rival international defence schemes to merge
items.description: UK chancellor says competing funding bodies should be brought together

items.title: Farage by-election move as it happened: Reform UK leader quits as MP
items.description: Tories and Labour refuse to participate in contest as head of rightwing populist party denies wrongdoing over donations

items.title: Meta releases first image model since Zuckerberg’s AI overhaul
items.description: Muse Spark Image will be integrated into tech giant’s AI chatbot and its Instagram photo app

items.title: Aberdeen-backed internet provider seeks buyer after steep losses
items.description: Airband initiates process to find new owner in move that puts £200mn of investors’ money at risk

items.title: French far-right leader Marine Le Pen says she will run for president
items.description: Politician sets up unprecedented election campaign next year by a convicted candidate

items.title: Farage by-election gambit undercut by rivals’ refusal to participate
items.description: Kemi Badenoch said Conservatives would not field candidate in ‘fake’ vote that comes amid growing scrutiny of Reform UK leader

items.title: Saudi Arabia blocking payments to UAE accounts, businesses say
items.description: Transfers from kingdom to companies and individuals in Dubai repeatedly returned or delayed in a sign of economic tension

items.title: Is ‘The View’ a News Show? ABC Says That’s Already Settled.
items.description: In a new filing, ABC said that the F.C.C. had ruled in 2002 that “The View” was a “bona fide news program.”

items.title: Mariska Hargitay to Host the Emmys
items.description: The “Law & Order: SVU” star is a departure from the comedians and sitcom actors who have typically hosted the annual awards show.

items.title: Trump Promised a Foreign Investment Boom. It’s Getting Harder to Deliver.
items.description: The threat of tariffs may have helped push more capital into the United States, but other factors are pushing it away.

items.title: U.S. Trade Deficit Widens in May on Record Goods Imports
items.description: Imports of foreign goods, including pharmaceuticals and equipment for data centers, hit a record high, pushing the monthly trade deficit to its highest level in over a year.

items.title: Why Index Funds Haven’t Boosted SpaceX
items.description: Some market watchers are puzzled that shares in Elon Musk’s rocket and A.I. company have stalled out despite major interest from Wall Street.

items.title: Those Soldiers Flooding Your Feeds? They Might Not Be Real.
items.description: Videos generated by artificial intelligence have swarmed social media to exploit public support of U.S. troops for other purposes.

items.title: Why Are Berries Everywhere, in Every Season? Driscoll’s.
items.description: The California giant has helped turn a local, seasonal treat into a worldwide refrigerator staple and marketing juggernaut.

items.title: Four Seasons Sets Sail, Offering Luxury and Curated Cruise Experiences
items.description: Luxury hotel brands are getting into the cruise business. A Mediterranean itinerary offered a taste of what at times seemed like a mega-yacht experience.
